v8_root_cause: Kaggle runtime has NO INTERNET (isInternetEnabled=false at runtime even though metadata says true; competition runs offline). pip install bitsandbytes hit NewConnectionError x5 retries, failed.
implication: 4-bit quantization fallback IS DEAD on this platform (needs internet to install bitsandbytes; not pre-installed in kaggle base image).
v9_solution: require vram>=50GB hard assertion (RTX Pro 6000 has 96GB, fits 30B bf16 ~60GB); drop 4-bit entirely; clear error msg if user picks T4.
next: user must select Accelerator -> NVIDIA RTX Pro 6000 (not T4 x2) then Save & Run All. If RTX Pro 6000 not available to this account, we need a bitsandbytes-prebuilt dataset.
